title: transcript_quality_config
description: Phase 2R operator-tunable configuration for the transcript-quality validator. `hard_max_byte_length` has a schema-enforced ceiling of 10M; operators cannot raise it above 10M without amending the schema.

then.$comment: Cross-field constraint is enforced in the loader (transcript_quality/_config_loader.py) because JSON Schema 2020-12 does not allow expressing inequalities between two sibling integers. The loader rejects any config where advisory_max_byte_length > hard_max_byte_length and the test test_advisory_above_hard_max_rejected pins the behaviour.
